caption: The video appears to be part of a series called "Sim Week," which provides an insight into the life of a surgical intern transitioning from student to residency. The scene shows a close-up of a medical procedure, likely a simulation exercise, where a person wearing gloves is handling a syringe and needle. The hands are carefully manipulating the needle, possibly demonstrating or practicing an injection technique on a model or patient. The setting suggests a clinical environment, with sterile conditions and medical equipment visible. The text overlay emphasizes the educational nature of the content, aiming to prepare students for their future roles as residents. The presence of a red tool nearby indicates that this might be part of a larger set of medical instruments used in the simulation.
